RoA_A01_M04_VO_S001_001.source: We are approaching Hillsbrad, my lord.

RoA_A01_M04_VO_S001_002.source: This town marks the site where the greenskins first unleashed their true barbarity on the lands of Lordaeron. And it still reeks of death and decay.

RoA_A01_M04_VO_S001_003.source: Lordaeron… but not the first time for humanity. The Horde is a blight that seeks to turn the entire continent into burning cinders…

RoA_A01_M04_VO_S001_004.source: I am ready to face them! Both my sword and bow thirst for orcish blood!

RoA_A01_M04_VO_S001_005.source: Lord Crowley is approaching Hillsbrad from the west. He’s ready to join us when we give the signal. Whatever awaits us there, we must retake Hillsbrad. Danath, sound the attack. Wilhelm, with me!

RoA_A01_M04_VO_S002_001.source: The Magistrate of Hillsbrad. Not even gold saved the bastard, and his folly cost Meryn his life.

RoA_A01_M04_VO_S002_002.source: So many corpses... The entire town has been slaughtered.

RoA_A01_M04_VO_S002_003.source: Too quiet… We've only faced scattered patrols. Where are the rest of their forces?

RoA_A01_M04_VO_S002_004.source: Stay vigilant. We must be ready for anything.

RoA_A01_M04_VO_S002_006.source: Danath, sound the signal to our allies!

RoA_A01_M04_VO_S002_007.source: Soldiers! The Lion of Azeroth calls! To battle!

RoA_A01_M04_VO_S003_001.source: My lord, the orc forces have been destroyed. The town is secured…

RoA_A01_M04_VO_S003_002.source: And in bad shape. The naval facilities have been completely destroyed. We must rebuild them and prepare an assault force before Zul'Dare can be taken.

RoA_A01_M04_VO_S003_003.source: We have to harvest and refine oil for our ships as well. There might be troll destroyers in the nearby waters.

RoA_A01_M04_VO_S003_004.source: Aye. Scout the area for any enemy ships, build up our naval infrastructure, and ready our forces for battle. You have your orders, men!

RoA_A01_M04_VO_S004_001.source: Commander, our scouts confirm that orcish vessels are patrolling the coastline.

RoA_A01_M04_VO_S004_002.source: These waters must be cleansed if we are to secure our perimeter.

RoA_A01_M04_VO_S004_003.source: You heard the man! Ready the sail

RoA_A01_M04_VO_S005_001.source: My lord, some orcish forces remain entrenched along the eastern shore.

RoA_A01_M04_VO_S005_002.source: Then let’s destroy them. We cannot prepare our invasion force with our rear exposed.

RoA_A01_M04_VO_S006_001.source: Sir Lothar, the dead are attacking us!

RoA_A01_M04_VO_S006_002.source: How deplorable. Where did these wretches come from?

RoA_A01_M04_VO_S006_003.source: I sense the vile stain of necromancy. The victims of the orcish slaughter find no rest.

RoA_A01_M04_VO_S006_004.source: Then we must find their bodies, consecrate them, and grant them the peace they deserve.

RoA_A01_M04_VO_S006_005.source: I’ll see to it personally. For the Light!

RoA_A01_M04_VO_S006_006.source: May the dead find solace in the hereafter.

RoA_A01_M04_VO_S008_001.source: My lord, preparations have been made. Our forces are ready.

RoA_A01_M04_VO_S008_002.source: Very well. Gavinrad, I want you to stay behind and defend Hillsbrad from any possible incursion — and keep an eye on our elven friend.

RoA_A01_M04_VO_S008_003.source: I’ll keep Hillsbrad safe, my lord commander.

RoA_A01_M04_VO_S008_004.source: Am I not to join the final assault?

RoA_A01_M04_VO_S008_005.source: Your skills are needed here in Hillsbrad, elf. We shall reconvene once our task is done.

RoA_A01_M04_VO_S008_006.source: Danath, you will lead the vanguard. Wilhelm, you’ll remain at my side. Lord Crowley…

RoA_A01_M04_VO_S008_007.source: Yes, I’ll see to it we reach Zul’Dare in one piece.

RoA_A01_M04_VO_S008_008.source: Time to bash more greenskin skulls.

RoA_A01_M04_VO_S009_001.source: Some time later, Alliance ships entered the waters of the Channel Islands.

RoA_A01_M04_VO_S009_002.source: As we navigate through the Channel Islands, the shores of Zul’Dare draw near. Our destination is within sight.

RoA_A01_M04_VO_S009_003.source: Captain, you have both eyes in place — tell me, what's that brown spot in the fog?

RoA_A01_M04_VO_S009_004.source: A troll destroyer ship. Seems like we’re going to have a naval fight.

RoA_A01_M04_VO_S009_005.source: Good thing we were wise enough to build and prepare our own ships — weren’t we?

RoA_A01_M04_VO_S010_001.source: No sign of Doomhammer. But these banners… I don’t recognize them.

RoA_A01_M04_VO_S010_002.source: These wretched orcs are forcing us to work day and night!

RoA_A01_M04_VO_S010_006.source: They tortured the soldiers we sent here a year ago… We will make them pay for this.

RoA_A01_M04_VO_S011_002.source: Burn it to the ground. The main orc in the fortress will be left without resources.

RoA_A01_M04_VO_S012_001.source: By the authority of the Alliance of Lordaeron, I order you — open this gate and surrender your weapons!

RoA_A01_M04_VO_S012_003.source: We are the Bloodscribe Clan! The Warchief has tasked us with protecting this island — and we shall! Your deaths will be a fitting sacrifice in his name!

RoA_A01_M04_VO_S012_004.source: Empty words, orc! We have destroyed your forces!

RoA_A01_M04_VO_S012_005.source: Yes… and you’ve thrown away your soldiers like kindling on a dying fire. That pathetic line behind the gate? They won’t save you — not when I’m standing over your shattered skull!

RoA_A01_M04_VO_S012_006.source: Shut up, orc! You’d better save your breath for when we cross blades!

RoA_A01_M04_VO_S012_007.source: The gates are shut. Wilhelm! Danath! Charge!

RoA_A01_M04_VO_S013_001.source: I was at the Warchief’s side in all his battles! I know his strategies — you can’t outsmart me!

RoA_A01_M04_VO_S013_002.source: I can leap to the archers on the wall. Danath, take care of the grunts down here.

RoA_A01_M04_VO_S014_001.source: You think it’s easy to defeat and kill me? Bloodscribes — attack!

RoA_A01_M04_VO_S014_002.source: For Doomhammer! For the Bloodscribe Clan!

RoA_A01_M04_VO_S014_003.source: Stromgarde, Lordaeron, Quel’Thalas— I saw them all burn! What chance do you have?!

RoA_A01_M04_VO_S014_004.source: Argh… I’m grievously wounded… I can’t continue the fight, my lord…

RoA_A01_M04_VO_S014_005.source: I’m badly wounded… You need to finish this without my aid, lad…

RoA_A01_M04_VO_S014_006.source: I can use that flagpole to jump from the wall.

RoA_A01_M04_VO_S015_002.source: We have you cornered, orc. There’s no point in fighting back now. Surrender — and tell me, where’s your Warchief?!

RoA_A01_M04_VO_S015_003.source: You think I have no honor? That I would betray my people?! Lok’tar ogar!

RoA_A01_M04_VO_S015_007.source: In the name of King Trollbane and the Kingdom of Stromgarde — for the crimes you committed against my people… my family… I hereby sentence you to die.

RoA_A01_M04_VO_S016_001.source: Our work here is finished. Gather the wounded, and let us return to Hillsbrad.

RoA_A01_M04_VO_S017_001.source: Next morning, Anduin Lothar and Danath Trollbane reached Hillsbrad.

RoA_A01_M04_VO_S017_002.source: Wilhelm and Meryn were laid to rest near the town, their sacrifice honored so that their heroism would be remembered for generations.

RoA_A01_M04_VO_S017_003.source: He has fallen in battle… gave his life for Azeroth — for me. He was a brave lad, an able soldier, and a loyal man. Much like Meryn. We must remember them as such.

RoA_A01_M04_VO_S017_005.source: I need to ride north — to rendezvous with Turalyon and confer with the High Command. Someone needs to check on those damned royals. And there’s an old acquaintance of mine I have to meet…

RoA_A01_M04_VO_S017_006.source: Don’t worry about it. You’ll hear from me soon enough. In the meantime, gather your forces and get some rest. You’ll need it — there’s a lot of work to do…

RoA_A01_M04_OBJE_002.source: To drive the Horde from western Lordaeron, their stronghold on the Channel Islands must be destroyed. Retake Hillsbrad, the foothold that anchors their presence, and reclaim the land for the Alliance!

RoA_A01_M04_OBJE_009.source:
|cffffcc00MAIN QUEST|r
Retake Hillsbrad
 - Secure the town
 - Danath must survive
 - Lothar must survive

RoA_A01_M04_OBJE_010.source:
|cffffcc00MAIN QUEST UPDATED|r
Retake Hillsbrad
 - |cff808080Secure the town (Completed)|r

RoA_A01_M04_OBJE_011.source:
|cffffcc00MAIN QUEST UPDATED|r
Retake Hillsbrad
 - Secure the coastline
 - Danath must survive
 - Lothar must survive

RoA_A01_M04_OBJE_013.source:
|cffffcc00MAIN QUEST FAILED|r
Retake Hillsbrad
 - |cffff0000Danath must Survive (Failed)|r

RoA_A01_M04_OBJE_014.source:
|cffffcc00MAIN QUEST FAILED|r
Retake Hillsbrad
 - |cffff0000Lothar must Survive (Failed)|r

RoA_A01_M04_OBJE_016.source: Ready your forces for the coming assault on Zul’dare. Ensure your army is equipped, trained, and prepared for the battles that lie ahead.

RoA_A01_M04_OBJE_017.source:
|cffffcc00MAIN QUEST|r
Preparations
 - Maintain 12 Archers
 - Maintain 12 Soldiers
 - Maintain 4 Transport Ships
 - Maintain 8 Destroyer Ships

RoA_A01_M04_OBJE_026.source:
|cffffcc00MAIN QUEST FAILED|r
Preparations
 - |cffff0000Your camp is destroyed!|r

RoA_A01_M04_OBJE_029.source: In order to prepare the navy for the assault at Zul'Dare, you will require massive amounts of Oil. Claim the local oil patches and build your Oil Platforms.

RoA_A01_M04_OBJE_034.source:
|cffffcc00OPTIONAL QUEST|r
Oil Deposits
 - Build 4 Oil Plarforms

RoA_A01_M04_OBJE_035.source:
|cffffcc00OPTIONAL QUEST UPDATED|r
Oil Deposits
 - Build 4 Oil Plarforms (1 of 4 built)

RoA_A01_M04_OBJE_036.source:
|cffffcc00OPTIONAL QUEST UPDATED|r
Oil Deposits
 - Build 4 Oil Plarforms (2 of 4 built)

RoA_A01_M04_OBJE_037.source:
|cffffcc00OPTIONAL QUEST UPDATED|r
Oil Deposits
 - Build 4 Oil Plarforms (3 of 4 built)

RoA_A01_M04_OBJE_042.source: Orcish forces linger on the eastern peninsula. Leave none alive and eradicate their presence to secure the region.

RoA_A01_M04_OBJE_044.source:
|cffffcc00OPTIONAL QUEST|r
Blackrock Remnants
 - Destroy all orcish forces

RoA_A01_M04_OBJE_048.source: The unholy presence of orcish necromancers has raised the slain people of Hillsbrad from their graves. Put an end to their suffering and cleanse the land of this dark magic.

RoA_A01_M04_OBJE_050.source:
|cffffcc00OPTIONAL QUEST|r
Ghosts of Hillsbrad
 - Destroy the corpse piles (0/3)

RoA_A01_M04_OBJE_052.source:
|cffffcc00OPTIONAL QUEST UPDATED|r
Ghosts of Hillsbrad
 - Destroy the corpse piles (1/3)

RoA_A01_M04_OBJE_053.source:
|cffffcc00OPTIONAL QUEST UPDATED|r
Ghosts of Hillsbrad
 - Destroy the corpse piles (2/3)

RoA_A01_M04_OBJE_056.source: The Horde’s naval base on Zul’dare marks the site of their first strike against the kingdom. Lead the attack and show their “Warchief” that the Alliance is coming for him. Leave no orc standing.

RoA_A01_M04_OBJE_061.source:
|cffffcc00MAIN QUEST|r
Zul’dare
 - Capture Zul'dare outposts
 - Destroy Bloodscribe camp
 - Lothar must survive
 - Danath must survive

RoA_A01_M04_OBJE_066.source:
|cffffcc00MAIN QUEST UPDATED|r
Zul’dare
 - |cff808080Destroy Bloodscribe clan camp. (Completed)|r

RoA_A01_M04_OBJE_068.source: Utok Scratcher, the Horde’s second-in-command warlord, must be struck down. His death will deal a shattering blow to the Horde, defeat him and turn the tide of battle.

RoA_A01_M04_OBJE_070.source: At least one of your heroes must survive.

RoA_A01_M04_OBJE_071.source:
|cffffcc00MAIN QUEST|r
Utok Scratcher
 - Defeat Utok Scratcher
 - At least one of your heroes must survive

RoA_A01_M04_OBJE_073.source:
|cffffcc00MAIN QUEST FAILED|r
Utok Scratcher
 - |cffff0000At least one of your heroes must survive (Failed)|r

RoA_A01_M04_OBJE_075.source: The orcish armada near Hillsbrad blocks the path to Zul’dare. Destroy their fleet and clear the waters to allow your forces safe passage.

RoA_A01_M04_OBJE_077.source:
|cffffcc00MAIN QUEST|r
Secure the Sea
 - Find and Destory Orcish Shipyards

RoA_A01_M04_MESS_001.source:
|cff8080ffNEW HERO|r
Anduin Lothar – Supreme Commander of the Grand Alliance. A masterful warrior with devastating frontline prowess.

RoA_A01_M04_MESS_002.source:
|cff8080ffNEW SEMI HERO|r 
Milan, Chronicler of the House of Scribes – A High Elf scribe skilled with sword and bow. Can switch between |cffff0000melee|r and |cff00ff00ranged|r combat for tactical advantage.

RoA_A01_M04_MESS_003.source:
|cff87ceebREINFORCEMENT|r  
Lord Crowley and a squad of Gilnean forces will follow Anduin Lothar. You cannot control them directly, however, as the Gilneans value their independence.

RoA_A01_M04_MESS_004.source:
|cff87ceebREINFORCEMENT|r
Gilnean Frigates can help you protect your coastline till you build your own destroyers.

RoA_A01_M04_MESS_005.source:
|cffffcc00TECHTREE UNLOCKED|r
Transports carry your forces across the sea.

RoA_A01_M04_MESS_006.source:
|cffffcc00TECHTREE ALTERATION|r
Gilnean labourers will help Anduin Lothar rebuild Hillsbrad and prepare military infrastructure.

RoA_A01_M04_MESS_007.source:
|cffffcc00TECHTREE ALTERATION|r  
Man at Arms. Seasoned Azerothian veterans capable of dealing multiplied damage when properly trained.  
With the Alliance weakened by heavy losses, Anduin Lothar has called upon his reserves, drawing from his most trusted compatriots.

RoA_A01_M04_MESS_008.source:
|cffffcc00TECHTREE UNLOCKED|r
Refineries serve as a drop off point for oil and provide tanker upgrades.

RoA_A01_M04_MESS_009.source:
|cffffcc00TECHTREE UNLOCKED|r
Foundry. Obsessed with creating the strongest force in the Alliance, human artisans provided Anduin Lothar with designs of the Foundry that can upgrade ships.

RoA_A01_M04_MESS_010.source:
|cffffcc00TECHTREE UNLOCKED|r  
Frontal Cannon Shot. With ample oil reserves, your Foundry artisans can now prepare enough explosives to equip your ships with frontal cannons.

RoA_A01_M04_MESS_011.source:
|cff32cd32HINT|r  
Milan is the only semi-hero whose rank increases after completing side quests. Each rank unlocks new abilities, enhances existing ones, and grants bonuses to health and movement speed.

RoA_A01_M04_MESS_012.source:
|cff32cd32HINT|r
Only Lothar can carry this flag.

RoA_A01_M04_SCRN_003.source: Flags to put in a circle:

RoA_A01_M04_SCRN_004.source: Flags to put in a circle:

RoA_A01_M04_SCRN_013.source: Act II "Khaz Modan" currenlty in development. Stay tuned for upcoming acts!
